label: Forum quote
summary: The forum quote block: source strip, quoted body, and the signature divider.
era: phpBB 2's [quote] pyramid, "Originally posted by" strips stacked like sediment, the signature ruled off below the post.

classes.name: rs-quote
classes.role: the quote block: 1px sunken border; nesting flattens past three

classes.name: rs-quote__source
classes.role: silver header strip: Originally posted by …

classes.name: rs-quote__sig
classes.role: signature divider: the -- line, then up to three muted lines

a11y: Put the quoted text in a real <blockquote>; the source strip sits outside it, so attribution never reads as quotation. Signatures stay under three lines, RFC 1855 manners, kept by CSS.
